---
title: "OpenFoodFacts — Taxonomy Explorer"
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
    self-contained: true
    toc: false
    theme: none
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500&family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
        <script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.min.js"></script>
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
import json, html as H
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict
from IPython.display import HTML, display

# ── helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def load_json(path):
    p = Path(path)
    if p.exists():
        with open(p, encoding="utf-8") as f:
            return json.load(f)
    return {}

def name_fr(tag): return (tag.get("name") or {}).get("fr", "")
def name_en(tag): return (tag.get("name") or {}).get("en", "")
def best_name(k, tag): return name_fr(tag) or name_en(tag) or k

# ── load ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
raw_cat  = load_json("categories.json")
raw_wiki = load_json("wikidata_labels.json")

CAT  = raw_cat.get("tags", raw_cat)
WIKI = raw_wiki

# ── demo fallback ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
DEMO = {
    "en:vegetables":       {"name":{"fr":"Légumes","en":"Vegetables","de":"Gemüse","es":"Verduras","it":"Verdure","nl":"Groenten","pt":"Legumes","pl":"Warzywa","ru":"Овощи","ar":"خضروات","zh":"蔬菜","ja":"野菜","sv":"Grönsaker","da":"Grøntsager","fi":"Vihannekset","hu":"Zöldségek"},"parents":[],"children":["en:root-vegetables","en:leafy-vegetables"],"products_count":28400},
    "en:fruits":           {"name":{"fr":"Fruits","en":"Fruits","de":"Früchte","es":"Frutas","it":"Frutti","nl":"Fruit","pt":"Frutas","pl":"Owoce","ru":"Фрукты","ar":"فواكه","zh":"水果","ja":"果物","sv":"Frukter","ko":"과일","tr":"Meyveler"},"parents":[],"children":["en:citrus","en:berries"],"products_count":22100},
    "en:cereals":          {"name":{"fr":"Céréales","en":"Cereals","de":"Getreide","es":"Cereales","it":"Cereali","nl":"Granen","pt":"Cereais","pl":"Zboża","ru":"Злаки","zh":"谷物","sv":"Spannmål","da":"Korn"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":15000,"wikidata":"Q1258"},
    "en:dairy-products":   {"name":{"fr":"Produits laitiers","en":"Dairy products","de":"Milchprodukte","es":"Lácteos","it":"Latticini","nl":"Zuivelproducten","pt":"Laticínios","ru":"Молочные продукты","pl":"Nabiał","sv":"Mejeriprodukter","da":"Mejeriprodukter","fi":"Maitotuotteet"},"parents":[],"children":["en:cheeses","en:yogurts"],"products_count":31200,"wikidata":"Q13"},
    "en:meats":            {"name":{"fr":"Viandes","en":"Meats","de":"Fleisch","es":"Carnes","it":"Carni","nl":"Vlees","pt":"Carnes","pl":"Mięso","ru":"Мясо","zh":"肉类","ar":"لحوم","sv":"Kött"},"parents":[],"children":["en:beef","en:pork","en:poultry"],"products_count":18600,"wikidata":"Q5853"},
    "en:fish-and-seafood": {"name":{"fr":"Poissons et fruits de mer","en":"Fish and seafood","de":"Fisch und Meeresfrüchte","es":"Pescados y mariscos","it":"Pesce e frutti di mare","nl":"Vis en zeevruchten","pt":"Peixe e frutos do mar","pl":"Ryby i owoce morza","sv":"Fisk och skaldjur"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":9800,"wikidata":"Q1024"},
    "en:legumes":          {"name":{"fr":"Légumineuses","en":"Legumes","de":"Hülsenfrüchte","es":"Legumbres","it":"Legumi","nl":"Peulvruchten","pt":"Leguminosas","ru":"Бобовые","zh":"豆类","sv":"Baljväxter"},"parents":["en:vegetables"],"children":["en:beans","en:lentils"],"products_count":7200},
    "en:beverages":        {"name":{"fr":"Boissons","en":"Beverages","de":"Getränke","es":"Bebidas","it":"Bevande","nl":"Dranken","pt":"Bebidas","ru":"Напитки","ar":"مشروبات","zh":"饮料","ja":"飲料","ko":"음료","sv":"Drycker","da":"Drikkevarer","fi":"Juomat","pl":"Napoje","tr":"İçecekler","hu":"Italok"},"parents":[],"children":["en:juices","en:soft-drinks","en:waters"],"products_count":45000,"wikidata":"Q40050"},
    "en:breads":           {"name":{"fr":"Pains","en":"Breads","de":"Brote","es":"Panes","it":"Pani","nl":"Broden","pt":"Pães","ru":"Хлеб","pl":"Chleby","sv":"Bröd","da":"Brød","fi":"Leivät"},"parents":["en:cereals"],"children":[],"products_count":12400},
    "en:sauces":           {"name":{"fr":"Sauces","en":"Sauces","de":"Soßen","es":"Salsas","it":"Salse","nl":"Sauzen","pt":"Molhos","ru":"Соусы","zh":"酱料","ar":"صلصات","sv":"Såser"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":8700,"wikidata":"Q178"},
    "en:confectioneries":  {"name":{"fr":"Confiseries","en":"Confectioneries","de":"Süßwaren","es":"Confitería","it":"Confetteria","nl":"Snoepgoed","pt":"Confeitaria","ru":"Кондитерские изделия","pl":"Wyroby cukiernicze","sv":"Konfektyr","da":"Slik","fi":"Makeiset"},"parents":[],"children":["en:chocolates","en:candies"],"products_count":21000,"wikidata":"Q2749"},
    "en:cheeses":          {"name":{"fr":"Fromages","en":"Cheeses","de":"Käse","es":"Quesos","it":"Formaggi","nl":"Kazen","pt":"Queijos","pl":"Sery","ru":"Сыры","sv":"Ostar","da":"Oste","fi":"Juustot","hu":"Sajtok"},"parents":["en:dairy-products"],"children":[],"products_count":14300,"wikidata":"Q10943"},
    "en:plant-based-foods":{"name":{"fr":"Aliments végétaux","en":"Plant-based foods","de":"Pflanzliche Lebensmittel","es":"Alimentos vegetales","it":"Cibi vegetali","nl":"Plantaardige voeding","sv":"Växtbaserade livsmedel","pt":"Alimentos vegetais"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":6100},
    "en:frozen-foods":     {"name":{"fr":"Aliments surgelés","en":"Frozen foods","de":"Tiefkühlkost","es":"Alimentos congelados","it":"Cibi surgelati","nl":"Diepvriesproducten","pt":"Alimentos congelados","pl":"Mrożonki","sv":"Frysmat","da":"Frossen mad"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":16800},
    "en:snacks":           {"name":{"fr":"Snacks","en":"Snacks","de":"Snacks","es":"Tentempiés","it":"Spuntini","nl":"Snacks","pt":"Salgadinhos","ru":"Снэки","ar":"وجبات خفيفة","zh":"小吃","ja":"スナック","ko":"과자","sv":"Snacks","da":"Snacks","fi":"Naposteltavat","tr":"Atıştırmalıklar","pl":"Przekąski"},"parents":[],"children":["en:chips","en:crackers"],"products_count":25600,"wikidata":"Q126"},
    "en:oils-and-fats":    {"name":{"fr":"Huiles et graisses","en":"Oils and fats","de":"Öle und Fette","es":"Aceites y grasas","it":"Oli e grassi","nl":"Oliën en vetten","pt":"Óleos e gorduras","sv":"Oljor och fetter","ru":"Масла и жиры","pl":"Oleje i tłuszcze"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":5500,"wikidata":"Q101"},
    "en:nuts":             {"name":{"fr":"Noix","en":"Nuts","de":"Nüsse","es":"Nueces","it":"Noci","nl":"Noten","pt":"Nozes","ru":"Орехи","ar":"مكسرات","zh":"坚果","sv":"Nötter","da":"Nødder","fi":"Pähkinät","tr":"Kuruyemişler"},"parents":["en:plant-based-foods"],"children":[],"products_count":4900,"wikidata":"Q11009"},
    "en:herbs-and-spices": {"name":{"fr":"Herbes et épices","en":"Herbs and spices","de":"Kräuter und Gewürze","es":"Hierbas y especias","it":"Erbe e spezie","nl":"Kruiden en specerijen","pt":"Ervas e especiarias","ru":"Травы и специи","ar":"أعشاب وتوابل","zh":"香草和香料","sv":"Örter och kryddor","da":"Urter og krydderier"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":3200,"wikidata":"Q3795"},
    "en:soups":            {"name":{"fr":"Soupes","en":"Soups","de":"Suppen","es":"Sopas","it":"Zuppe","nl":"Soepen","pt":"Sopas","pl":"Zupy","ru":"Супы","zh":"汤","sv":"Soppor","da":"Supper","fi":"Keitot","hu":"Levesek"},"parents":[],"children":[],"products_count":11200,"wikidata":"Q41415"},
    "en:fermented-foods":  {"name":{"fr":"Aliments fermentés","en":"Fermented foods","de":"Fermentierte Lebensmittel","es":"Aliments fermentats","it":"Cibi fermentati","nl":"Gefermenteerde voeding","sv":"Fermenterade livsmedel","ko":"발효식품","ja":"発酵食品","zh":"发酵食品"},"parents":[],"children":["en:yogurts","en:cheeses","en:kimchi"],"products_count":4300},
}

demo_mode = not bool(CAT)
if demo_mode:
    CAT = DEMO

# Merge wikidata labels
for tag_key, tag in CAT.items():
    wk = tag.get("wikidata")
    if not wk: continue
    wid = list(wk.values())[0] if isinstance(wk, dict) else wk
    if wid and WIKI.get(wid):
        tag["_wikidataLabel"] = WIKI[wid].get("label") or WIKI[wid].get("en") or ""

# ── stats ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
lang_count = defaultdict(int)
total_trans = wikidata_count = 0
for tag in CAT.values():
    for lang, nm in (tag.get("name") or {}).items():
        if nm:
            lang_count[lang] += 1
            total_trans += 1
    wk = tag.get("wikidata")
    if wk and (isinstance(wk, str) or (isinstance(wk, dict) and wk)):
        wikidata_count += 1

lang_list = sorted(lang_count.items(), key=lambda x: -x[1])
TAG_COUNT  = len(CAT)
LANG_COUNT = len(lang_list)
TOP_LANGS  = lang_list[:25]

# ── serialise for JS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
import json as _json

def _safe(o):
    """Compact JSON safe for embedding in <script>."""
    return _json.dumps(o, ensure_ascii=False)

cat_js       = _safe(CAT)
lang_list_js = _safe([{"lang": l, "count": c} for l, c in TOP_LANGS])
stats_js     = _safe({
    "tagCount":      TAG_COUNT,
    "langCount":     LANG_COUNT,
    "totalTrans":    total_trans,
    "wikidataCount": wikidata_count,
    "langList":      [{"lang": l, "count": c} for l, c in lang_list],
})
```

```{python}
# ── Build the full page HTML identical to the original ────────────────────────

demo_banner = ""
if demo_mode:
    demo_banner = """<div class="hint-box visible">
  <strong>⚠ Mode démo</strong> — categories.json non trouvé. Données de démonstration intégrées.
</div>"""

# Build table rows in Python (server-side, no JS needed for static render)
entries = list(CAT.items())
max_t = max((len(t.get("name") or {}) for _,t in entries), default=1)
max_p = max((t.get("products_count") or 0 for _,t in entries), default=1)

def pct_bar(val, mx, color):
    p = round(val / mx * 100) if mx else 0
    return f'<div class="bi"><div class="bt"><div class="bf" style="width:{p}%;background:{color}"></div></div><span class="nv">{val}</span></div>'

rows = ""
for key, tag in entries:
    fr   = name_fr(tag);  en = name_en(tag)
    disp = fr or en or key
    sub  = en if en and en != fr else ""
    langs    = len(tag.get("name") or {})
    children = len(tag.get("children") or [])
    prod     = tag.get("products_count") or 0
    parents_h = "".join(
        f'<span class="pill pb2">{H.escape(p.split(":")[-1])}</span>'
        for p in (tag.get("parents") or [])[:2]
    ) or '<span style="color:var(--muted)">—</span>'
    wk = tag.get("wikidata")
    if isinstance(wk, dict): wk = list(wk.values())[0] if wk else None
    wlabel = tag.get("_wikidataLabel", "")
    wk_h = (f'<a href="https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/{wk}" target="_blank" '
            f'style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--blue)">{wk}</a>'
            + (f'<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">{H.escape(wlabel)}</div>' if wlabel else "")
            ) if wk else '<span style="color:var(--muted)">—</span>'
    rows += f"""<tr>
      <td>
        <div style="font-weight:500;color:var(--text)">{H.escape(disp)}</div>
        {f'<div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)">{H.escape(sub)}</div>' if sub else ''}
      </td>
      <td><span class="mono-tag">{H.escape(key)}</span></td>
      <td>{pct_bar(langs, max_t, 'var(--green)')}</td>
      <td><span style="color:var(--muted2);font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px">{children}</span></td>
      <td>{pct_bar(prod, max_p, 'var(--blue)') if prod else '<span style="color:var(--muted)">—</span>'}</td>
      <td>{parents_h}</td>
      <td>{wk_h}</td>
    </tr>"""

# Cloud tags
CCOLORS = [
    {"bg":"rgba(74,222,128,.1)","border":"rgba(74,222,128,.28)","text":"#4ade80"},
    {"bg":"rgba(96,165,250,.1)","border":"rgba(96,165,250,.28)","text":"#60a5fa"},
    {"bg":"rgba(245,158,11,.1)","border":"rgba(245,158,11,.28)","text":"#f59e0b"},
    {"bg":"rgba(45,212,191,.1)","border":"rgba(45,212,191,.28)","text":"#2dd4bf"},
    {"bg":"rgba(248,113,113,.1)","border":"rgba(248,113,113,.28)","text":"#f87171"},
]
def sh(s):
    h = 0
    for c in s: h = (h*31 + ord(c)) & 0xFFFF
    return h

cloud_tags = ""
for key, tag in CAT.items():
    label = best_name(key, tag)
    size  = max(10, min(17, 10 + len(tag.get("name") or {}) * 0.6))
    c = CCOLORS[sh(key) % len(CCOLORS)]
    cloud_tags += f'<span class="ctag" style="font-size:{size:.1f}px;background:{c["bg"]};border-color:{c["border"]};color:{c["text"]}">{H.escape(label)}</span>'

page = f"""
<div class="shell">

<!-- HEADER -->
<header>
  <div class="eyebrow">OpenFoodFacts · Taxonomy Explorer</div>
  <h1>Catégories &amp; <em>Traductions</em></h1>
  <div class="meta-row">
    <div class="meta-chip"><span class="dot"></span>categories.json</div>
    <div class="meta-chip"><span class="dot"></span>wikidata_labels.json</div>
    <div class="ts">Généré · <span id="ts">—</span></div>
  </div>
</header>

{demo_banner}

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="sc"><div class="n g">{TAG_COUNT}</div><div class="l">Tags catégories</div></div>
  <div class="sc"><div class="n b">{LANG_COUNT}</div><div class="l">Langues détectées</div></div>
  <div class="sc"><div class="n a">{total_trans:,}</div><div class="l">Traductions totales</div></div>
  <div class="sc"><div class="n t">{wikidata_count}</div><div class="l">Entrées Wikidata</div></div>
</div>

<!-- TOOLBAR -->
<div class="toolbar">
  <span class="tlabel">FILTRE</span>
  <button class="fbtn on" data-v="all"  onclick="sw('all')">Tout</button>
  <button class="fbtn"    data-v="cat"  onclick="sw('cat')">Catégories</button>
  <button class="fbtn"    data-v="lang" onclick="sw('lang')">Langues les plus traduites</button>
  <div class="tr">
    <div class="sw">
      <span class="si">⌕</span>
      <input class="sbox" id="sq" placeholder="filtrer…" oninput="onSQ(this.value)">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- APP -->
<div id="app"></div>

<!-- HIDDEN DATA FOR JS -->
<script id="d-cat"   type="application/json">{cat_js}</script>
<script id="d-stats" type="application/json">{stats_js}</script>

</div><!-- /shell -->

<!-- FOOTER -->
<div style="max-width:1120px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 2rem">
  <div class="foot">
    Données locales ·
    <a href="https://world.openfoodfacts.org" target="_blank">world.openfoodfacts.org</a>
    · MIT License
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── STATIC TABLE + CLOUD (hidden, swapped in by JS) ── -->
<template id="tpl-cat">
<div class="view">
  <div class="grid2">
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Traductions par catégorie</span></div>
      <div class="pbody"><div class="cw tall"><canvas id="ccat"></canvas></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="panel">
      <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Parents vs Enfants (scatter)</span></div>
      <div class="pbody"><div class="cw tall"><canvas id="csc"></canvas></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="panel" style="margin-top:1rem">
    <div class="ph">
      <span class="pt">Détail des catégories</span>
      <span class="pb" id="cat-count">{len(entries)} résultats</span>
    </div>
    <div style="overflow-x:auto">
      <table class="dtbl" id="dtbl-cat">
        <thead><tr>
          <th>Nom</th><th>Tag ID</th><th>Traductions</th><th>Enfants</th>
          <th>Produits</th><th>Parents</th><th>Wikidata</th>
        </tr></thead>
        <tbody id="cat-tbody">{rows}</tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</template>

<template id="tpl-cloud">
<div class="sdiv"><span>Nuage de catégories</span></div>
<div class="panel"><div class="cloud">{cloud_tags}</div></div>
</template>

<script>
document.getElementById('ts').textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('fr-FR');

// ── Load embedded data ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const CAT   = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('d-cat').textContent);
const STATS = JSON.parse(document.getElementById('d-stats').textContent);

let VIEW = 'all', SQ = '', CHARTS = {{}};

function nameFr(t) {{ return (t.name||{{}}).fr || ''; }}
function nameEn(t) {{ return (t.name||{{}}).en || ''; }}

// ── Chart defaults ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const TT = {{
  responsive:true, maintainAspectRatio:false, animation:{{duration:380}},
  plugins:{{
    legend:{{display:false}},
    tooltip:{{backgroundColor:'#1e2126',borderColor:'#2a2d35',borderWidth:1,
      titleColor:'#e8eaed',bodyColor:'#9ca3af',
      titleFont:{{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:11}},bodyFont:{{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:11}}}},
  }},
  scales:{{
    x:{{grid:{{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)'}},ticks:{{color:'#6b7280',font:{{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:10}}}}}},
    y:{{grid:{{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.04)'}},ticks:{{color:'#6b7280',font:{{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:10}}}}}},
  }},
}};

// ── Routing ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function sw(v) {{
  VIEW = v;
  document.querySelectorAll('.fbtn').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('on', b.dataset.v === v));
  killCharts(); renderView();
}}
function onSQ(q) {{
  SQ = q.toLowerCase();
  if (VIEW !== 'cat') {{ sw('cat'); return; }}
  killCharts(); renderView();
}}
function killCharts() {{
  Object.values(CHARTS).forEach(c => {{ try {{ c.destroy(); }} catch(_){{}} }});
  CHARTS = {{}};
}}
function renderView() {{
  if (VIEW === 'all') vAll();
  else if (VIEW === 'cat') vCat();
  else vLang();
}}

// ── VIEW: TOUT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function vAll() {{
  const el = document.getElementById('app');
  const top15 = STATS.langList.slice(0,15);
  el.innerHTML = `<div class="view">
    <div class="grid2">
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Noms par langue — top 15</span><span class="pb">${{top15.length}} langues</span></div>
        <div class="pbody"><div class="cw"><canvas id="cb"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Répartition top 8</span></div>
        <div class="pbody"><div class="cw"><canvas id="cd"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    ${{document.getElementById('tpl-cloud').innerHTML}}
  </div>`;
  buildBar('cb', top15);
  buildDoughnut('cd', STATS.langList.slice(0,8));
}}

// ── VIEW: CATÉGORIES ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function vCat() {{
  const entries = Object.entries(CAT).filter(([key, tag]) => {{
    if (!SQ) return true;
    return key.includes(SQ)
      || nameFr(tag).toLowerCase().includes(SQ)
      || nameEn(tag).toLowerCase().includes(SQ);
  }});

  const el = document.getElementById('app');
  el.innerHTML = document.getElementById('tpl-cat').innerHTML;

  // Filter table rows
  const tbody = document.getElementById('cat-tbody');
  if (SQ) {{
    const keep = entries.map(([k]) => k);
    tbody.querySelectorAll('tr').forEach(tr => {{
      const tag_id = tr.querySelector('.mono-tag')?.textContent || '';
      tr.style.display = keep.includes(tag_id) ? '' : 'none';
    }});
  }}
  document.getElementById('cat-count').textContent = entries.length + ' résultats';

  buildCatBar('ccat', entries);
  buildScatter('csc', entries);
}}

// ── VIEW: LANGUES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function vLang() {{
  const top = STATS.langList.slice(0,25);
  const maxC = top[0]?.count || 1;
  const NAMES = {{fr:'Français',en:'English',de:'Deutsch',es:'Español',it:'Italiano',
    nl:'Nederlands',pt:'Português',pl:'Polski',ru:'Русский',ar:'العربية',
    zh:'中文',ja:'日本語',ko:'한국어',sv:'Svenska',da:'Dansk',fi:'Suomi',
    hu:'Magyar',ro:'Română',cs:'Čeština',nb:'Norsk bokmål',tr:'Türkçe',
    el:'Ελληνικά',he:'עברית',uk:'Українська',ca:'Català',hr:'Hrvatski',
  }};
  const rows = top.map((l,i) => {{
    const pct = Math.round(l.count/maxC*100);
    const cov = Math.round(l.count/STATS.tagCount*100);
    const bg = i<3?'var(--green)':i<8?'var(--blue)':'var(--teal)';
    return `<tr>
      <td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--muted2)">${{String(i+1).padStart(2,'0')}}</td>
      <td><span class="pill ${{i<3?'pg':i<8?'pb2':'pa'}}">${{l.lang}}</span></td>
      <td style="font-weight:500;color:var(--text)">${{NAMES[l.lang]||l.lang}}</td>
      <td><div class="bi"><div class="bt" style="min-width:120px"><div class="bf" style="width:${{pct}}%;background:${{bg}}"></div></div><span class="nv">${{l.count}}</span></div></td>
      <td style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--muted2)">${{cov}} %</td>
    </tr>`;
  }}).join('');

  document.getElementById('app').innerHTML = `<div class="view">
    <div class="grid2 full">
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Couverture linguistique — top ${{top.length}}</span></div>
        <div class="pbody"><div class="cw tall"><canvas id="clb"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid2" style="margin-top:1rem">
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Classement détaillé</span></div>
        <div style="overflow-x:auto">
          <table class="dtbl">
            <thead><tr><th>#</th><th>Code</th><th>Langue</th><th>Catégories traduites</th><th>Couverture</th></tr></thead>
            <tbody>${{rows}}</tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph"><span class="pt">Radar — top 10</span></div>
        <div class="pbody"><div class="cw tall"><canvas id="crad"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
  buildLangBar('clb', top);
  buildRadar('crad', top.slice(0,10));
}}

// ── Charts ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function buildBar(id, langs) {{
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id).getContext('2d');
  CHARTS[id] = new Chart(ctx, {{
    type:'bar',
    data:{{labels:langs.map(l=>l.lang),datasets:[{{
      data:langs.map(l=>l.count),
      backgroundColor:langs.map((_,i)=>i<3?'#4ade80':i<8?'#60a5fa':'#2dd4bf'),
      borderWidth:0,borderRadius:2
    }}]}},
    options:TT,
  }});
}}
function buildDoughnut(id, langs) {{
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id).getContext('2d');
  CHARTS[id] = new Chart(ctx, {{
    type:'doughnut',
    data:{{labels:langs.map(l=>l.lang),datasets:[{{
      data:langs.map(l=>l.count),
      backgroundColor:['#4ade80','#60a5fa','#f59e0b','#2dd4bf','#f87171','#a78bfa','#fb923c','#e879f9'],
      borderWidth:0,hoverOffset:6,
    }}]}},
    options:{{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{{duration:380}},cutout:'62%',
      plugins:{{
        legend:{{display:true,position:'right',labels:{{color:'#9ca3af',font:{{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:11}},boxWidth:12,padding:10}}}},
        tooltip:TT.plugins.tooltip,
      }}}},
  }});
}}
function buildCatBar(id, entries) {{
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id)?.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) return;
  CHARTS[id] = new Chart(ctx, {{
    type:'bar',
    data:{{
      labels:entries.map(([k,t])=>nameFr(t)||nameEn(t)||k),
      datasets:[{{label:'Langues',data:entries.map(([,t])=>Object.keys(t.name||{{}}).length),
        backgroundColor:'#4ade80',borderWidth:0,borderRadius:2}}],
    }},
    options:{{...TT,indexAxis:'y'}},
  }});
}}
function buildScatter(id, entries) {{
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id)?.getContext('2d');
  if (!ctx) return;
  const pts = entries.map(([k,t])=>({{x:(t.parents||[]).length,y:(t.children||[]).length,label:nameFr(t)||nameEn(t)||k}}));
  CHARTS[id] = new Chart(ctx, {{
    type:'scatter',
    data:{{datasets:[{{label:'Catégories',data:pts,backgroundColor:'rgba(96,165,250,0.45)',borderColor:'#60a5fa',borderWidth:1,pointRadius:6,pointHoverRadius:9}}]}},
    options:{{...TT,plugins:{{...TT.plugins,tooltip:{{...TT.plugins.tooltip,callbacks:{{label:c=>`${{c.raw.label||''}} — parents:${{c.parsed.x}} enfants:${{c.parsed.y}}`}}}}}}}},
  }});
}}
function buildLangBar(id, langs) {{
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id).getContext('2d');
  const g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,600,0);
  g.addColorStop(0,'#4ade80');g.addColorStop(.5,'#60a5fa');g.addColorStop(1,'#2dd4bf');
  CHARTS[id] = new Chart(ctx, {{
    type:'bar',
    data:{{labels:langs.map(l=>l.lang),datasets:[{{data:langs.map(l=>l.count),backgroundColor:g,borderWidth:0,borderRadius:2}}]}},
    options:TT,
  }});
}}
function buildRadar(id, langs) {{
  const ctx = document.getElementById(id).getContext('2d');
  CHARTS[id] = new Chart(ctx, {{
    type:'radar',
    data:{{
      labels:langs.map(l=>l.lang),
      datasets:[{{label:'Couverture',data:langs.map(l=>l.count),
        backgroundColor:'rgba(74,222,128,0.12)',borderColor:'#4ade80',
        borderWidth:1.5,pointBackgroundColor:'#4ade80',pointRadius:3}}],
    }},
    options:{{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{{duration:380}},
      plugins:{{legend:{{display:false}},tooltip:TT.plugins.tooltip}},
      scales:{{r:{{grid:{{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)'}},angleLines:{{color:'rgba(255,255,255,0.06)'}},
        ticks:{{display:false}},pointLabels:{{color:'#6b7280',font:{{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:11}}}}}}}}}},
  }});
}}

// ── Boot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
renderView();
</script>
"""

display(HTML(page))
```
